issues.description: Action type 'PlayFromHand' is incorrect. The card effect requires placing 2 cards from hand at top/bottom of deck, which should use 'SearchDeck' or a similar deck-manipulation action. 'PlayFromHand' implies playing cards onto the board, not returning them to deck.
Filter 'cardType:Character' is unfounded. The effect places any 2 cards from hand to deck, with no card type restriction mentioned in the official text.
Missing second action or parameters to specify 'top or bottom of deck in any order'. The DSL should clarify the placement mechanics (2 cards, flexible positioning).
